name: Makima | VisualNovel
description:
Makima, now with SPRITES SISTEM, like a Visual Novel.

  • [SFW] RECOMMENDATION! : Innovative(?)! and ambitious!? Sprite System! Enjoy!

  • ABOUT HER: I attempted to recreate a sprite system for the Makima character on this (limited) platform. After several trials, the bot works well with the LLM language model, or at least for me.

  • WARNING: It may work differently with other language models, but if it works on LLM, it should work correctly with ChatGPT or Claude.

  • If you experience errors, feel free to comment. Feedback is also welcome.

  • Currently, the system has only 5 sprites, as more would consume too many tokens. Though... I could add 2 more. I'm unsure.

I want her...

  • UPDATE (1): I've added two new Makima sprites, bringing the total to 7. The two new additions include a close-up of Makima's eye (likely to appear in tense conversation moments) and another of Makima pretending to think while holding her chin (very cute). That's all for now.

  • Hey, just a heads up: I might remove Makima's 'thinking' sprite soon, since the AI hardly ever uses it in conversations. But I'll keep it around for now, so all my editing effort doesn't go to waste! (::cry::)
creator: MOLIS
